title: Consistent Widget Spacing with mb-3 Class
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want consistent spacing between UI widgets, so that the layout feels organized and professional.
description:
Standardize vertical spacing between widgets by adding the `mb-3` class to navigation elements and card containers. Remove inline styles that were creating inconsistent spacing.

## Approach
- Add `mb-3` class to navigation bar for separation from content below
- Replace inline margin/padding styles on card elements with `mb-3`
- Ensure consistent spacing between all stacked elements
acceptance_criteria: Navigation has mb-3 margin bottom for separation from content
Inline margin styles are replaced with mb-3 class on card elements
Spacing is consistent between all stacked widgets on the page
ux_changes: Standardized widget spacing using Bootstrap mb-3 class, replacing inconsistent inline styles across the application.
implementation_notes: Developer applied mb-3 across multiple pages proactively.
comment_summary: Developer applied the spacing changes across multiple pages and pushed to staging.
